variants: Phineas Alder proudly resides in Sugarloaf Marsh, where he has made his mark in the field of organic chemistry. He is the inventor of the Petrolight Parsing Unit, a device that has advanced the scientific understanding of various organic compounds. His contributions to the discipline earned him the prestigious Radiant Eclipse Medallion, recognizing his excellence in research. In his spare time, Phineas is an enthusiastic member of the Garnet Kite Builders, bringing his innovative spirit to the hobby of kite building and flying.
